identityScript.coreTraits: The person behind all these domains: grounded, positive, present. The guy people feel better around — not performing, just being. Calm energy, real conversations, no front.
identityScript.nonNegotiables: Wim Hof every morning. Movement and gym. Meditation. Clean eating. Deep work. No substances. No video games. Quietness, reflection, and stillness.
identityScript.physicalPresence: Kind to others. Confident. Assertive. But genuine.
identityScript.socialFilter: Kind, happy people who are self-motivated. Share interests. Genuine. Trustworthy. Unselfish.
identityScript.decisionStyle: Assertive. Uses learned tools to manage stress — Advaita, Wim Hof, cold showers, walks. Acts despite the discomfort.

antiVision: Smokes weed. Skips gym for any emotion or timing excuse. Watches porn. Isolates. Reactive. Overweight. Hates himself.

domains.label: Health
domains.actual: Hit planned gym sessions, run protein-first meals, prioritize sleep quality and emotional regulation during stress.
domains.becoming: 200 lbs with an athletic Olympic lifter build. Lean, strong, disciplined. Training is non-negotiable.
habits: Train daily — no excuses for emotion or timing

domains.label: Wealth
domains.actual: Prioritize AI fluency and minimum two deep-work blocks/day on high-leverage output. Keep compounding systems steady and tie major spending decisions to explicit long-term intent.
domains.becoming: 100k/year providing premium value across AI, meditation, personal growth, and addiction recovery. Financial tracker app and productivity/self-improvement vision app as primary vehicles.
habits: Build and ship on financial tracker app
Build and ship on productivity/vision app
Study and apply AI to domains I love

domains.label: Love
domains.actual: Reduce isolation with deliberate weekly social contact. Pursue honest relationship clarity conversations.
domains.becoming: Romantic: shared vision of future, alignment on daily and long-term routine and goals. Mutual respect. Excitement. Fulfilling relationship. Social: active local community, friends who push each other forward.
habits: Be grateful for parents, family, partner, friends — daily
Send one thoughtful text to partner every day
Check in with partner 2-3x/week with prepared topics
Smile to parents and ask about them
Initiate one social plan per week

domains.label: Self
domains.actual: Keep daily reflection/journaling and meditation active; protect sobriety streaks and interrupt urges immediately. Replace at least one zero-sum leisure loop with a positive-sum activity.
domains.becoming: Calm, resilient, self-aware. Mind protected at all costs. Morning priorities before others. Focused. Grounded. Proactive. 3 years clean from all substances. Consistently curious — reading, exploring, never stagnant.
habits: Protect mornings — my priorities before others

habitStacks: After waking → no devices, journal first
After warm water → Wim Hof + identity script

steps: Prepare for deep work or rest of day

habitStacks: After journal → warm tea, wind down

books: As a Man Thinketh — James Allen
The Perfume of Silence — Francis Lucille
nutritionRules: Predictable grocery list — low decision friction
No junk defaults — if it's not helping, it's hurting
